name: Conflict-of-Interest Divestiture Rollover

eligibility.description: Available to executive branch officers, judicial officers, and their spouses/minor children who receive a formal certificate of divestiture from the OGE or Judicial Conference.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows eligible federal executive or judicial officers to defer capital gains tax on the sale of property required by a certificate of divestiture by reinvesting in permitted property (U.S. obligations or diversified funds) within 60 days.
